import React from 'react'; import { ChevronLeft, ShieldCheck, TrendingUp, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; /** * CreditScoreDetailsScreen Component * Analytics and insights for the user's credit standing. */ const CreditScoreDetailsScreen = ({ onBack }) => { // Mock data const score = 742; const rating = "Excellent"; const scoreFactors = [ { label: 'Payment History', status: 'Excellent', color: 'text-emerald-400' }, { label: 'Credit Utilization', status: 'Good', color: 'text-blue-400' }, { label: 'Account Age', status: 'Fair', color: 'text-orange-400' }, ]; return (
{/* Header */}

Credit Insights

{/* Content */}
{/* Score Gauge */}
{score} {rating}
{/* Score Factors */}

Score Factors

{scoreFactors.map((factor, i) => (
{factor.label} {factor.status}
))}
{/* Insights Card */}

Score increased by 12pts

Your consistent on-time utility payments are boosting your score.

); }; export default CreditScoreDetailsScreen;
